questionHtml:
The ratio  number of primary turns number of secondary turns  for a transformer is 2.5.

The primary coil of the transformer draws a current of 0.25 A from a 200 V alternating current (ac) supply. The current in the secondary coil is 0.5 A. What is the efficiency of the transformer?

A. 20 %

B. 50 %

C. 80 %

D. 100 %

meta.title: The ratio number of primary turns number of secondary turns for a transformer is 2.5. The primary coil of the transformer draws a current of 0.25 A from a 200 V alternating current
